expectations.evidence: Immediately identifies test intent as 'HSM archive with 4 concurrent copytools writing large files' and moves to collection.
Attempted python3 scripts/collect_lustre_topology.py mds,client but bash was denied. Correctly stopped rather than substituting static analysis.
Preview table: 'max_requests — If < 4, some of your 4 copytools will queue rather than run concurrently'
Single focused table with 4 rows (hsm_control, max_requests, MDT count, client mount) — proper Layer 1 approach
Opening identifies 'HSM concurrency test' and table addresses concurrent copytool capacity
Only 4 critical facts in the preview table, not a full dump of all parameters. Significant improvement over iteration 1.
